error_signature: credentials window is missing input fields
title: Missing input fields in credentials window
symptom: The credentials window does not display input fields, and they briefly appear before disappearing. This issue occurs in both Firefox and Google Chrome.
root_cause: The issue is caused by the environment variable 'N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE' set in the Docker configuration, which interferes with the rendering of the credentials input fields.
fix_steps: Remove the line setting the 'N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE' environment variable
agent_instruction: Remove the 'N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE' variable from your Docker Compose file and restart the container.
